{
  "$schema": "https://json.schemastore.org/tsconfig",
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2022",
    "lib": ["ES2022","DOM","DOM.Iterable"],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "allowJs": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noImplicitReturns": true,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "jsx": "preserve",
    "incremental": true,
    "plugins": [{"name": "next"}]
  },
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}
README.md:
# JAUP Platform ⚡

**J-Roc Apex Ultra Platform** — 50 apps, one monorepo, Supabase-only backend.

## Stack
- **Monorepo**: Turborepo + npm workspaces
- **Frontend**: Next.js 14 App Router + Tailwind CSS
- **Backend**: Supabase (Postgres + Auth + RLS)
- **Shared packages**: `@jaup/types` · `@jaup/ui` · `@jaup/utils` · `@jaup/supabase-client`

## Quick Start
```bash
# 1. Install deps
npm install

# 2. Copy env vars from Supabase dashboard
cp .env.example apps/web-portal/.env.local
# Fill in NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL + NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY

# 3. Run schema (paste supabase/migrations/001_init.sql into Supabase SQL editor)

# 4. Seed app registry
# paste supabase/seed/001_app_registry.sql into Supabase SQL editor

# 5. Start dev
cd apps/web-portal && npm run dev
# → http://localhost:3000
```

## 50 Apps
| Category | Apps |
|---|---|
| 🎵 Music | Music Studio, Beat Lab, Lyrics Forge, Sample Vault, Podcast Hub, Video Studio, Royalty Tracker, Fan Club |
| 💰 Finance | Trading & Forecasting, Portfolio Tracker, Options Trader, Budget Planner, Net Worth, Tax Prep, Real Estate |
| 🔐 Crypto | DeFi Dashboard, Crypto Wallet, NFT Studio, Market Scanner |
| ⚙️ Productivity | Command Center, Copilot Tasks, Project Board, Time Tracker, Goal Setter, CRM Hub, Invoice Manager, Contract Vault, Booking Engine, Password Vault |
| 🤖 AI | AI Writer, Research Lab, News Aggregator |
| 📱 Marketing | Social Scheduler, Email Campaigns, Affiliate Hub, Link Shortener |
| 📚 Education | AI Tutor, Course Builder, Quiz Engine, Flash Cards |
| 💪 Health | Habit Tracker, Fitness Coach, Nutrition Planner, Sleep Tracker, Meditation Hub, Journal Vault |
| 🛒 Commerce | Merch Store, Drop Shipper |
| 📊 Analytics | Analytics Dashboard |

supabase/migrations/001_init.sql:
-- ============================================================
-- JAUP Platform — Full Database Schema
-- Paste into: https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/qrcxiiweshwtverxsego/sql/new
-- ============================================================

create extension if not exists "uuid-ossp";
create extension if not exists "pg_trgm";
create extension if not exists "moddatetime";

-- ── Profiles ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
create table if not exists public.profiles (
  id          uuid primary key references auth.users(id) on delete cascade,
  email       text not null,
  full_name   text,
  avatar_url  text,
  role        text not null default 'user'  check (role  in ('admin','user','premium')),
  plan        text not null default 'free'  check (plan  in ('free','pro','ultra')),
  created_at  timestamptz not null default now(),
  updated_at  timestamptz not null default now()
);
create trigger profiles_moddatetime before update on public.profiles
  for each row execute function moddatetime(updated_at);

-- ── App Registry ─────────────────────────────────────────────
create table if not exists public.app_registry (
  id            text primary key,
  name          text not null,
  description   text,
  icon          text,
  category      text,
  route         text not null,
  is_active     boolean not null default true,
  requires_plan text not null default 'free' check (requires_plan in ('free','pro','ultra')),
  sort_order    integer not null default 0
);

-- ── Tracks / Beats / Playlists ────────────────────────────────
create table if not exists public.tracks (
  id               uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id          uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,
  title            text not null,
  genre            text,
  bpm              integer,
  key              text,
  duration_seconds integer,
  file_url         text,
  cover_url        text,
  status           text not null default 'draft' check (status in ('draft','published','archived')),
  play_count       integer not null default 0,
  created_at       timestamptz not null default now(),
  updated_at       timestamptz not null default now()
);
create trigger tracks_moddatetime before update on public.tracks
  for each row execute function moddatetime(updated_at);

create table if not exists public.beats (
  id           uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id      uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,
  title        text not null,
  bpm          integer not null default 120,
  key          text not null default 'C',
  genre        text not null default 'Hip-Hop',
  tags         text[] not null default '{}',
  file_url     text,
  price        numeric(10,2) not null default 0,
  license_type text not null default 'basic' check (license_type in ('basic','premium','exclusive')),
  created_at   timestamptz not null default now()
);

create table if not exists public.playlists (
  id          uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id     uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,
  name        text not null,
  description text,
  cover_url   text,
  is_public   boolean not null default false,
  created_at  timestamptz not null default now()
);

create table if not exists public.playlist_tracks (
  playlist_id uuid not null references public.playlists(id) on delete cascade,
  track_id    uuid not null references public.tracks(id)    on delete cascade,
  sort_order  integer not null default 0,
  primary key (playlist_id, track_id)
);

-- ── Portfolios / Positions / Forecasts ────────────────────────
create table if not exists public.portfolios (
  id           uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id      uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,
  name         text not null,
  description  text,
  total_value  numeric(20,4) not null default 0,
  cash_balance numeric(20,4) not null default 0,
  created_at   timestamptz not null default now(),
  updated_at   timestamptz not null default now()
);
create trigger portfolios_moddatetime before update on public.portfolios
  for each row execute function moddatetime(updated_at);

create table if not exists public.positions (
  id            uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  portfolio_id  uuid not null references public.portfolios(id) on delete cascade,
  user_id       uuid not null references public.profiles(id)   on delete cascade,
  symbol        text not null,
  asset_type    text not null default 'stock' check (asset_type in ('stock','crypto','option','forex')),
  quantity      numeric(20,8) not null,
  avg_cost      numeric(20,4) not null,
  current_price numeric(20,4) not null default 0,
  pnl           numeric(20,4) not null default 0,
  pnl_pct       numeric(10,4) not null default 0,
  opened_at     timestamptz not null default now(),
  updated_at    timestamptz not null default now()
);
create index if not exists positions_portfolio_idx on public.positions(portfolio_id);

create table if not exists public.forecasts (
  id               uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id          uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,
  symbol           text not null,
  target_price     numeric(20,4) not null,
  prediction_date  date not null,
  confidence_score numeric(5,2)  not null check (confidence_score between 0 and 100),
  model_used       text not null default 'manual',
  notes            text,
  actual_price     numeric(20,4),
  outcome          text check (outcome in ('pending','correct','incorrect')),
  created_at       timestamptz not null default now()
);

create table if not exists public.trade_history (
  id           uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  portfolio_id uuid not null references public.portfolios(id) on delete cascade,
  user_id      uuid not null references public.profiles(id)   on delete cascade,
  symbol       text not null,
  side         text not null check (side in ('buy','sell')),
  quantity     numeric(20,8) not null,
  price        numeric(20,4) not null,
  fee          numeric(10,4) not null default 0,
  total        numeric(20,4) not null,
  executed_at  timestamptz not null default now()
);

-- ── Commands / Logs ───────────────────────────────────────────
create table if not exists public.commands (
  id           uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id      uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,
  title        text not null,
  description  text,
  command_type text not null default 'manual' check (command_type in ('automation','webhook','scheduled','manual')),
  payload      jsonb not null default '{}',
  status       text not null default 'active' check (status in ('active','inactive','error')),
  last_run_at  timestamptz,
  run_count    integer not null default 0,
  created_at   timestamptz not null default now()
);

create table if not exists public.command_logs (
  id          uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  command_id  uuid not null references public.commands(id) on delete cascade,
  user_id     uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,
  status      text not null check (status in ('success','failure','running')),
  output      text,
  error       text,
  duration_ms integer,
  ran_at      timestamptz not null default now()
);
create index if not exists command_logs_ran_at on public.command_logs(ran_at desc);

-- ── Copilot Tasks ─────────────────────────────────────────────
create table if not exists public.copilot_tasks (
  id             uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id        uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,
  title          text not null,
  description    text,
  priority       text not null default 'medium' check (priority in ('low','medium','high','critical')),
  status         text not null default 'todo' check (status in ('todo','in_progress','blocked','done')),
  due_date       date,
  tags           text[] not null default '{}',
  app_context    text references public.app_registry(id),
  ai_suggestions text,
  created_at     timestamptz not null default now(),
  updated_at     timestamptz not null default now()
);
create trigger copilot_tasks_moddatetime before update on public.copilot_tasks
  for each row execute function moddatetime(updated_at);

-- ── Projects / Tasks ──────────────────────────────────────────
create table if not exists public.projects (
  id          uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id     uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,
  name        text not null,
  description text,
  color       text not null default '#7c3aed',
  status      text not null default 'active' check (status in ('active','archived','completed')),
  created_at  timestamptz not null default now()
);

create table if not exists public.project_tasks (
  id          uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  project_id  uuid not null references public.projects(id) on delete cascade,
  user_id     uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,
  title       text not null,
  description text,
  column_name text not null default 'todo' check (column_name in ('backlog','todo','in_progress','review','done')),
  priority    text not null default 'medium' check (priority in ('low','medium','high')),
  due_date    date,
  sort_order  integer not null default 0,
  created_at  timestamptz not null default now(),
  updated_at  timestamptz not null default now()
);
create trigger project_tasks_moddatetime before update on public.project_tasks
  for each row execute function moddatetime(updated_at);

-- ── Habits / Logs ─────────────────────────────────────────────
create table if not exists public.habits (
  id             uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id        uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,
  name           text not null,
  description    text,
  frequency      text not null default 'daily' check (frequency in ('daily','weekly','monthly')),
  target_count   integer not null default 1,
  color          text not null default '#7c3aed',
  icon           text not null default '⚡',
  is_active      boolean not null default true,
  streak_current integer not null default 0,
  streak_best    integer not null default 0,
  created_at     timestamptz not null default now()
);

create table if not exists public.habit_logs (
  id          uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  habit_id    uuid not null references public.habits(id)   on delete cascade,
  user_id     uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,
  logged_date date not null,
  count       integer not null default 1,
  notes       text,
  created_at  timestamptz not null default now(),
  unique(habit_id, logged_date)
);

-- ── Contacts ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
create table if not exists public.contacts (
  id                uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id           uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,
  full_name         text not null,
  email             text,
  phone             text,
  company           text,
  role              text,
  tags              text[] not null default '{}',
  status            text not null default 'lead' check (status in ('lead','prospect','customer','churned')),
  last_contacted_at timestamptz,
  notes             text,
  created_at        timestamptz not null default now(),
  updated_at        timestamptz not null default now()
);
create trigger contacts_moddatetime before update on public.contacts
  for each row execute function moddatetime(updated_at);

-- ── Invoices ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
create table if not exists public.invoices (
  id             uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id        uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,
  client_name    text not null,
  client_email   text not null,
  invoice_number text not null,
  line_items     jsonb not null default '[]',
  subtotal       numeric(12,2) not null default 0,
  tax_rate       numeric(5,2)  not null default 0,
  tax_amount     numeric(12,2) not null default 0,
  total          numeric(12,2) not null default 0,
  status         text not null default 'draft' check (status in ('draft','sent','paid','overdue','cancelled')),
  issued_date    date not null default current_date,
  due_date       date not null,
  paid_at        timestamptz,
  notes          text,
  created_at     timestamptz not null default now()
);

-- ── Time Entries ──────────────────────────────────────────────
create table if not exists public.time_entries (
  id               uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id          uuid not null references public.profiles(id)   on delete cascade,
  project_id       uuid references public.projects(id) on delete set null,
  description      text not null,
  start_time       timestamptz not null,
  end_time         timestamptz,
  duration_seconds integer,
  billable         boolean not null default false,
  hourly_rate      numeric(8,2),
  tags             text[] not null default '{}',
  created_at       timestamptz not null default now()
);

-- ── Budget ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create table if not exists public.budget_categories (
  id            uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id       uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,
  name          text not null,
  type          text not null check (type in ('income','expense')),
  color         text not null default '#7c3aed',
  icon          text not null default '💰',
  monthly_limit numeric(12,2),
  created_at    timestamptz not null default now()
);

create table if not exists public.transactions (
  id          uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id     uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,
  category_id uuid references public.budget_categories(id) on delete set null,
  description text not null,
  amount      numeric(12,2) not null,
  type        text not null check (type in ('income','expense')),
  date        date not null default current_date,
  notes       text,
  created_at  timestamptz not null default now()
);

-- ── Journal / Goals / Analytics ───────────────────────────────
create table if not exists public.journal_entries (
  id         uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id    uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,
  title      text,
  body       text not null,
  mood       text check (mood in ('great','good','okay','bad','terrible')),
  tags       text[] not null default '{}',
  is_private boolean not null default true,
  date       date not null default current_date,
  created_at timestamptz not null default now(),
  updated_at timestamptz not null default now()
);

create table if not exists public.goals (
  id            uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id       uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,
  title         text not null,
  description   text,
  category      text not null default 'personal',
  target_value  numeric(12,2),
  current_value numeric(12,2) not null default 0,
  unit          text,
  deadline      date,
  status        text not null default 'active' check (status in ('active','completed','paused','abandoned')),
  created_at    timestamptz not null default now(),
  updated_at    timestamptz not null default now()
);

create table if not exists public.analytics_events (
  id         uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id    uuid not null references public.profiles(id)      on delete cascade,
  app_id     text not null references public.app_registry(id),
  event_name text not null,
  properties jsonb not null default '{}',
  session_id text,
  created_at timestamptz not null default now()
);
create index if not exists analytics_events_user_app on public.analytics_events(user_id, app_id);
create index if not exists analytics_events_created  on public.analytics_events(created_at desc);

-- ── Row Level Security ────────────────────────────────────────
do $$ declare t text; begin
  foreach t in array array[
    'profiles','tracks','beats','playlists','playlist_tracks',
    'portfolios','positions','forecasts','trade_history',
    'commands','command_logs','copilot_tasks',
    'projects','project_tasks','habits','habit_logs',
    'contacts','invoices','time_entries',
    'budget_categories','transactions','journal_entries','goals','analytics_events'
  ] loop
    execute format('alter table public.%I enable row level security', t);
  end loop;
end $$;

alter table public.app_registry enable row level security;

-- Profiles — own row
create policy "profiles_owner"     on public.profiles        for all using (auth.uid() = id);
-- App registry — read-only for authenticated
create policy "app_registry_read"  on public.app_registry    for select using (auth.role() = 'authenticated');
-- All user-data tables — owner only
create policy "tracks_owner"       on public.tracks          for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "beats_owner"        on public.beats           for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "playlists_owner"    on public.playlists       for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "portfolios_owner"   on public.portfolios      for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "positions_owner"    on public.positions       for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "forecasts_owner"    on public.forecasts       for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "trade_hist_owner"   on public.trade_history   for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "commands_owner"     on public.commands        for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "cmd_logs_owner"     on public.command_logs    for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "cop_tasks_owner"    on public.copilot_tasks   for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "projects_owner"     on public.projects        for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "proj_tasks_owner"   on public.project_tasks   for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "habits_owner"       on public.habits          for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "habit_logs_owner"   on public.habit_logs      for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "contacts_owner"     on public.contacts        for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "invoices_owner"     on public.invoices        for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "time_entries_owner" on public.time_entries    for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "budget_cats_owner"  on public.budget_categories for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "transactions_owner" on public.transactions    for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "journal_owner"      on public.journal_entries for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "goals_owner"        on public.goals           for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "analytics_owner"    on public.analytics_events for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);
create policy "pl_tracks_owner"    on public.playlist_tracks for all
  using (exists (select 1 from public.playlists p where p.id = playlist_id and p.user_id = auth.uid()));

-- ── Auto-create profile on signup ─────────────────────────────
create or replace function public.handle_new_user()
returns trigger language plpgsql security definer set search_path = public as $$
begin
  insert into public.profiles(id, email, full_name, avatar_url)
  values(
    new.id,
    new.email,
    new.raw_user_meta_data->>'full_name',
    new.raw_user_meta_data->>'avatar_url'
  );
  return new;
end;
$$;

drop trigger if exists on_auth_user_created on auth.users;
create trigger on_auth_user_created
  after insert on auth.users
  for each row execute function public.handle_new_user();
supabase/seed/001_app_registry.sql:
-- Run AFTER the schema migration
insert into public.app_registry (id,name,description,icon,category,route,is_active,requires_plan,sort_order) values
